coreResponsibility.summary: A UI plugin for the Kaltura Player JS that provides social sharing, embed code generation, video clipping, and URL copy functionality for video content.

featureOwnership: Social media sharing (Facebook, LinkedIn, X/Twitter, Email)
Embed code generation with customizable dimensions
dataHandling: Video clipping state (full video, start-from, clip options)
Player state for pause/resume on share overlay open/close

upstream.name: @playkit-js/kaltura-player-js
upstream.description: Core Kaltura Player that this plugin extends via BasePlugin

upstream.name: playkit-ui-managers
upstream.description: Provides upperBarManager and AudioPluginsManager services for button registration

downstream.name: Kaltura Player UI
downstream.description: Renders share button in upper bar and overlay in GuiArea

downstream.name: Social Media Platforms
downstream.description: Opens share URLs for Facebook, LinkedIn, X/Twitter

externalAPIs.name: Web Share API
externalAPIs.description: navigator.share() for native mobile sharing when useNative is enabled

entryPoints.description: Main entry point that registers the share plugin with Kaltura Player
Core Share plugin class extending BasePlugin with configuration and lifecycle methods
Share component that renders the share overlay portal
Main overlay component with social buttons, URL copy, embed options, and video clipping
Default configuration for social share options (Facebook, LinkedIn, Twitter, Email, Embed)

configurationOptions.shareUrl: Custom share URL (defaults to parent page URL)
configurationOptions.useNative: Use native Web Share API when available (default: false)
configurationOptions.shareOptions: Configure which social networks to display and their templates
